Mason Stevens Forms Autofill Dashboard

Upload a Fact Find / Client Review, select a client, then generate prefilled Mason Stevens forms. You can also upload a ZIP of Mason Stevens forms and save it in this dashboard for future use.
1. Saved form templates

Built-in attached Mason Stevens forms are ready.

2. Upload Fact Find / Client Review

The dashboard looks for the same two-client layout as your Client Review page and will allow you to choose one client.

3. Review / edit extracted details
Optional spouse / joint client details
Manual form amounts / extra details
4. Select Mason Stevens forms

Signature fields, date signed fields and adviser/client signature dates are intentionally left blank.
